programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa's nerves are tested when Nayoung arrives with a furry friend; Umma shares an uncomfortable lunch with Jung and Shannon; bad timing makes Kimchee neglect a co-worker in need.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa finds marijuana in the house; Shannon throws a staff party that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Kimchee enjoy an impromptu hangout together; Janet and Umma find an envelope of money in the store; Jung and Shannon struggle to watch TV together.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry's date with Jean McGrory goes well until a gorgeous sex worker bursts in demanding her due; Leung bangs his head against a door and the students post the video online; Trudy regrets her decision.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Sean and Miranda's relationship is on the rocks, and Gerry feels he has to meddle; Robert wants to punish a student; Simon agrees to donate blood.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: When Gerry runs into a distraught Daniel Negreanu, he organizes a staff poker night to help him; things seem to be going well until Wayne Leung ends up winning.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark collects Christmas toys for the needy, which leads to an uncomfortable discovery about one of his classmates; Pop's prodigal son shows up.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark and Mike bond over Mark's role in a school play; Pop turns to Mary for help after the CRA learns he's been collecting his dead wife's pension checks.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is hired to be a local winery's spokesperson; David struggles with a health problem.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David joins some townies on a turkey hunt; Jocelyn and Moira have a spa day; Alexis meets Ted, the town veterinarian.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David try to sell cosmetics to the locals; Johnny tries to collect unemployment insurance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny agrees to speak at a stranger's funeral; Alexis struggles with her boyfriend's love of animals.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate searches for the magic; Anne learns to let go; Sloane honors her priorities; Jenny course corrects; Val makes amends.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate returns to her advertising agency after maternity leave and discovers two people hired in her absence. Frankie experiences postpartum disorder.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: While trying to have it all, Kate ends up leaving her husband; Anne is fed up with her daughter; Jenny makes a discovery upon returning to work.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate gets a lesson on vulnerability; Anne tries tough love on her daughter; Jenny plays dumb at work.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry's date with Jean McGrory goes well until a gorgeous sex worker bursts in demanding her due; Leung bangs his head against a door and the students post the video online; Trudy regrets her decision.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate learns a lesson about child care; Anne hires a mean nanny; Jenny favours work life to her home life.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon makes a tough decision when a young girl falls in love with her cat; Nikki uses Kristian's eavesdropping against him and Paul's involvement in a crime hits close to home for Hugh and Liam.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.sub-title: I Might Still Be Mad In A Week
programme.desc: Thank God it's Friday; a vegan's last meal; back pain; the horror.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Will Sasso hosts a gala night of comedy about the ups and downs of falling in love; featuring Joe Vu, Jen Grant, Amanda Brooke Perrin, and Patrick Haye.
